context: Tests whether the agent follows the shopify-blog-post skill's HTML conventions, voice rules, SEO metadata requirements, and blog post structure. The agent should produce correct heading hierarchy (h2 for sections), compliant SEO fields, and a properly structured article with the prescribed skeleton.

checklist.name: Section headings use h2
checklist.description: article.html uses <h2> tags for section headings throughout — NOT <h1> (which is reserved for the article title rendered by Shopify)

checklist.name: Paragraphs in p tags
checklist.description:
All body paragraph text in article.html is wrapped in

tags (not plain text or only in div tags)

checklist.name: No generic intro phrase
checklist.description: The article does NOT open with a generic phrase like 'In today's fast-paced world', 'In the world of', or similar filler opening — it starts with a concrete, specific statement or scene

checklist.name: Hook paragraph first
checklist.description: The article opens with a short hook paragraph (1-3 sentences) before moving into the main content — it does not jump straight into a list or background summary

checklist.name: Soft CTA at end
checklist.description: The article closes with a soft CTA paragraph linking to a product, collection, or relevant page (not a hard sales pitch, but a gentle invitation)

checklist.name: Title under 60 characters
checklist.description: The title field in article-metadata.json is under 60 characters

checklist.name: Handle is kebab-case and ≤50 chars
checklist.description: The handle field in article-metadata.json is kebab-case (lowercase, hyphenated, no spaces or underscores) and is 50 characters or fewer

checklist.name: Summary length 120-160 chars
checklist.description: The summary field in article-metadata.json is between 120 and 160 characters

checklist.name: Tags 3-5 lowercase hyphenated
checklist.description: The tags field contains 3-5 tags, all lowercase and hyphenated (no camelCase, no spaces, no underscores)

checklist.name: Summary includes primary keyword
checklist.description: The summary field includes the primary keyword from the title at least once
